tasks.label: 编译当前 C++ 文件
args: FILE="${file}"; WS="${workspaceFolder}"; if grep -q 'gtest/gtest.h' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then g++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -g -I"$WS/src" -I"$WS/deps" -I"$WS/deps/googletest/googletest/include" -I"$WS/deps/googletest/googletest" -I"${fileDirname}" "$FILE" "$WS/deps/googletest/googletest/src/gtest-all.cc" "$WS/deps/googletest/googletest/src/gtest_main.cc" -o "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}" -pthread; else g++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -g -I"$WS/src" -I"$WS/deps" -I"${fileDirname}" "$FILE" -o "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; fi

tasks.label: 编译并运行当前 C++ 文件
tasks.dependsOn: 编译当前 C++ 文件
